title: Post root cause to accountability thread

log.context: Post root cause to accountability thread

Message posted successfully. The RCA landed in thread `1486546692701556849` with message ID `1486547889877684266`. It covers both the incomplete Nemesis expunge (root cause: no grep-first enumeration) and the reform sync bugs (silent path scanning failure + lossy YAML round-trip in the FIRE handler), along with the proposed GIGA-001 accountability trail format and a question about maintaining a `giga-log.md`.
